sectors/gaming.title: Gaming Projects — Web Games & Community Platforms
sectors/gaming.description: Development of web games and websites dedicated to gaming communities and interactive experiences.
sectors/gaming.metaTitle: Gaming Projects — Web Games & Interactive Platforms | Dibodev
sectors/gaming.metaDescription: Web games and gaming applications developed by Léo Guillaume, freelance developer in Rennes: online games, community sites, and interactive experiences.

content.text: I develop games and community platforms with a strong focus on UX, performance, and user engagement. Fun, accessible experiences built with solid technical foundations.

sectors/reseaux-sociaux.title: Social Network Projects — Community Applications
sectors/reseaux-sociaux.description: Development of social, community, and interactive multi-platform applications.
sectors/reseaux-sociaux.metaTitle: Social Network Projects — Social Applications | Dibodev
sectors/reseaux-sociaux.metaDescription: Community and social applications developed by Léo Guillaume, freelance developer in Rennes: web, mobile, and multi-platform solutions.

content.text: I design modern social and community applications: content navigation, user interactions, and integration of complex third-party APIs. Smooth, cross-platform experiences designed for engagement.
